segments.text: It looked like a recovery mixup situation, but...
segments.original_text: 見えたリフコンの展開だったんですが
掴んだなおちゃディディー

segments.text: with bair off the wall during the recovery
segments.original_text: リフティング空中後ろの壁で
なんとか後助けを借りますが

segments.text: No, when trying to cover the vertical angle...
segments.original_text: いや縦軸が合わせようとすると
横にフリップで逃げて

segments.text: and when trying to cover the horizontal...
segments.original_text: 横軸合わせようとすると

full_text: It looked like a recovery mixup situation, but... naochan grabbed with Diddy Kong extending the combo with bair off the wall during the recovery getting back somehow, but... No, when trying to cover the vertical angle... flipping away horizontally to escape and when trying to cover the horizontal...
